title: Window Permanance
excerpt: Often, I use Monday in conjunction with other pieces of software, i.e. I am referring to text that was entered in Monday for a video editing project.  However, if there is more than a few words, they only stay visible wh…

posts.author: PSlab (Peter Slabysz)
posts.cookedHtml: Often, I use Monday in conjunction with other pieces of software, i.e. I am referring to text that was entered in Monday for a video editing project. However, if there is more than a few words, they only stay visible while the mouse hovers over it. It would be great if a pop out window would stay up while I use the editing software in another monitor. Thanks!
